sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5028" key="a)mbluhkoi/+a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμβλῠ-ηκοΐα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n5028.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hardness of hearing,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0732.tlg006:327:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Aphr.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Top.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">327.15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
